rationale: The skill centers on Firebase Hosting via the firebase-tools CLI (invoked through npx), which reads/writes firebase.json and .firebaserc, manages a local .firebase cache, and authenticates against Google/Firebase APIs. Deployment uploads static assets from a public directory to Firebase's CDN, requiring network access to googleapis.com and firebase domains. The emulator command shown spawns npx to fetch firebase-tools from the npm registry. Reference markdown files under references/ are read for configuration and deployment details.
